description_long: This is a classic American-style roadside mailbox with a rounded, cylindrical black metal body mounted on a single wooden post. The front face features a silver-gray door with a small latch and a mail slot, while the side displays a prominent red flag used to signal outgoing mail. The mailbox is designed to be weather-resistant, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish on the metal and a natural wood grain texture on the post. The red flag is attached to the right side and can be raised or lowered. The mailbox is large enough to accommodate letters, magazines, and small parcels. There are no visible identification markings or numbers on the exterior.
description: A black cylindrical metal mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a single wooden post and featuring a front mail slot and latch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver-gray door with latch and mail slot, mounted on a wooden post.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red mail flag and the cylindrical black body of the mailbox.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid black back of the mailbox and the wooden post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red flag visible on top and the black cylindrical body.
